title: tricalysia niamniamensis subsp. nodosa
intro: Tricalysia niamniamensis subsp. nodosa, also known as the Niam Niam plant, is a plant species found in the tropical regions of Africa, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tricalysia niamniamensis subsp. nodosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Tricalysia niamniamensis subsp. nodosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
